name: Winston Lin
title: Developer platforms, serverless, and cloud infrastructure
tagline: Over the last several years I have worked across CI/CD, Kubernetes, and serverless, with a focus on platform adoption, migration, and day-two product quality.
meta_description: Winston Lin writes about developer platforms, serverless, migration, and infrastructure product strategy, with case studies from OCI Functions, Kubernetes, and CI/CD.
intro_paragraphs: Most of my work sits at the intersection of product, infrastructure, and developer experience. Over the last several years I have worked across CI/CD, Kubernetes, and serverless platforms inside OCI.
This site keeps the parts of that work that translate well in public: case studies, a few notes on platform and product strategy, and selected tools tied to real operating problems.
Some of the writing here first appears on Oracle Blogs. Some of it starts as notes and gets cleaned up later. I try to keep it direct.
focus_areas: Migration readiness and practical product strategy
AI products that need trust and operational clarity
experience_highlights: Principal Product Manager for OCI Functions, focused on platform primitives, developer experience, and execution model
Previously led product work across OCI Kubernetes Engine and OCI DevOps / CI/CD
Built and launched internal platform capabilities that shortened delivery cycles and reduced operational drag
Most of my work has been in platform and infrastructure products that need to earn trust from technical users over time
